document: SSA Annual Statistical Supplement, 2014 — OASDI Awards to Retired Workers (section 6.B)
table_of_record: 6.B5.1 — Number, average age, and percentage distribution, by sex and age at entitlement, 1998-2013
fetch_method: browser (in-app Browser pane; ssa.gov returns HTTP 403 to curl/WebFetch). Acquired by the orchestrator per design amendment 3d (§2.8.10.1, PR #190); staged and sha256-verified before commit.
note: Build-time provenance for the raw HTML source. The load-time tamper gate the M6 factory asserts is the sha256 of the extracted JSON (ssa_claim_ages_2014supplement.json), not this raw-source hash (§2.8.10.4).
